member.name: T:DTSBase.Configuration
member.summary: DTS decode configuration.

member.name: P:DTSBase.Configuration.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the configuration name.

member.name: P:DTSBase.Configuration.IsEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether DTS decoding is enabled for the entire program.

member.name: P:DTSBase.Configuration.ExcludeFromMaxCalc
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether DTS should exclude this configuration from the overall Min/Max temperature calculations.

member.name: P:DTSBase.Configuration.LastPattern
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether DTS decoding is enabled for the entire program.

member.name: P:DTSBase.Configuration.SensorsMap
member.summary: Gets or sets the dieid sensors map.

member.name: P:DTSBase.Configuration.Mode
member.summary: Gets or sets the decoding mode. Default is linear.

member.name: P:DTSBase.Configuration.RegisterSize
member.summary: Gets or sets sensor register size (number of bits).

member.name: P:DTSBase.Configuration.Slope
member.summary: Gets or sets the slope for DTS decoding.

member.name: P:DTSBase.Configuration.Offset
member.summary: Gets or sets the offset for DTS decoding.

member.name: P:DTSBase.Configuration.SetPoint
member.summary: Gets or sets temperature set point. It can read double or user var value.

member.name: P:DTSBase.Configuration.UpperTolerance
member.summary: Gets or sets upper tolerance limit to fail for worst sensor.

member.name: P:DTSBase.Configuration.LowerTolerance
member.summary: Gets or sets lower tolerance limit to fail for worst sensor.

member.name: P:DTSBase.Configuration.UpperIntegrityLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets upper integrity limit. Values above this number are treated as invalid reads and ignored.

member.name: P:DTSBase.Configuration.LowerIntegrityLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets lower integrity limit. Values below this number are treated as invalid reads and ignored.

member.name: P:DTSBase.Configuration.DatalogMode
member.summary: Gets or sets data mode. DISABLED, REDUCED, ALL.

member.name: P:DTSBase.Configuration.CompressedDatalog
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether DEFLATE32 compressed format should be printed to ituff.

member.name: P:DTSBase.Configuration.SharedStorage
member.summary: Gets or sets a shared storage token to save DTS measurements.

member.name: P:DTSBase.Configuration.PinName
member.summary: Gets or sets captured pin name.

member.name: P:DTSBase.Configuration.SensorsList
member.summary: Gets or sets list ALL DTS sensors.

member.name: P:DTSBase.Configuration.IgnoredSensorsList
member.summary: Gets or sets list of ignored DTS sensors.

member.name: M:DTSBase.Configuration.VerifySettings(System.Collections.Generic.List{DTSBase.Configuration})
member.summary: Verifies the settings of the DTS configuration.
member.param: The list of DTS configurations to verify.
member.exception: Thrown when the configuration is invalid.

member.name: M:DTSBase.Configuration.VerifySettings(DTSBase.Configuration)
member.summary: Verifies the settings of the DTS configuration.
member.exception: Thrown when the configuration is invalid.

member.name: M:DTSBase.Configuration.FilterValues(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double}},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Filters the values based on the sensors map.

member.name: M:DTSBase.Configuration.FilterValuesMax(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double}},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Filters the values based on the sensors map.

member.name: T:DTSBase.Configuration.DieSensors
member.summary: Represents the sensors for a specific die.

member.name: P:DTSBase.Configuration.DieSensors.PinName
member.summary: Gets or sets the CTV pin name for the DieId.

member.name: P:DTSBase.Configuration.DieSensors.Sensors
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of sensors.

member.name: P:DTSBase.Configuration.DieSensors.IgnoredSensors
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of ignored sensors.

member.name: T:DTSBase.DTSFactory
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: T:DTSBase.DTSImpl
member.summary: DTSImpl.

member.name: M:DTSBase.DTSImpl.#ctor(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:DTSBase.DTSImpl.LowerTolerance
member.summary: Gets or sets the lower tolerances.

member.name: P:DTSBase.DTSImpl.UpperTolerance
member.summary: Gets or sets the upper tolerances.

member.name: P:DTSBase.DTSImpl.LowerIntegrityLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets the lower integrity limit. Values lower than this are considered invalid and ignored.

member.name: P:DTSBase.DTSImpl.UpperIntegrityLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets the upper integrity limit. Values higher than this are considered invalid and ignored.

member.name: P:DTSBase.DTSImpl.Console
member.summary: Gets a variable holding Prime.Services.ConsoleService or null depending on the current instances LogLevel.

member.name: T:DTSBase.PrimeDTS
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: M:DTSBase.PrimeDTS.#ctor(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:DTSBase.PrimeDTS.Console
member.summary: Gets a variable holding Prime.Services.ConsoleService or null depending on the current instances LogLevel.

member.name: M:DTSBase.PrimeDTS.ProcessCapturedData(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Process capture data.

member.name: T:DDG.DTS
member.summary: Singleton for DTS service.

member.name: F:DDG.DTS.DTSConfigurationTable
member.summary: Gets key for DTS configuration table in shared storage.

member.name: F:DDG.DTS.DTSVoltageTargetsMappingTable
member.summary: Gets key for DTS configuration voltage targets mapping in shared storage.

member.name: F:DDG.DTS.MaxTemperatureToken
member.summary: MaxTemperatureToken SharedStorage token name.

member.name: F:DDG.DTS.MaxInstanceToken
member.summary: MaxInstanceToken SharedStorage token name.

member.name: F:DDG.DTS.MaxSensorToken
member.summary: MaxSensorToken SharedStorage token name.

member.name: F:DDG.DTS.MinTemperatureToken
member.summary: MinTemperatureToken SharedStorage token name.

member.name: F:DDG.DTS.MinInstanceToken
member.summary: MinInstanceToken SharedStorage token name.

member.name: F:DDG.DTS.MinSensorToken
member.summary: MinSensorToken SharedStorage token name.

member.name: P:DDG.DTS.Service
member.summary: Gets or sets Dlvr service implementation.

member.name: T:DDG.DTSHandler
member.summary: Wrapper for DTS post-processing.

member.name: M:DDG.DTSHandler.GetServiceType
member.summary: Gets service type. scs or ctv.

member.name: M:DDG.DTSHandler.SetConfiguration(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Sets DTS configuration pointer.

member.name: M:DDG.DTSHandler.IsDtsEnabled
member.summary: Indicates if DTS capture mode is enabled.

member.name: M:DDG.DTSHandler.GetCtvPinNames
member.summary: Gets CTV capture pin.

member.name: M:DDG.DTSHandler.Reset
member.summary: Resets captured values.

member.name: M:DDG.DTSHandler.Start(System.String)
member.summary: Starts DTS capturing.

member.name: M:DDG.DTSHandler.Stop(System.String)
member.summary: Starts DTS capturing.

member.name: M:DDG.DTSHandler.ProcessPlistDts(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Process plist settings for DTS modes.

member.name: M:DDG.DTSHandler.EvaluateLimits(System.String)
member.summary: Evaluates DTS limits.

member.name: M:DDG.DTSHandler.GetPerTargetPerSensorMax(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Evaluates DTS limits.
member.param: List of voltage targets to evaluate.

member.name: M:DDG.DTSHandler.PrintToDatalog(System.String)
member.summary: Prints datalog values to datalog.

member.name: T:DDG.IDTS
member.summary: Interface for VoltageConverter methods extending PRIME capabilities.

member.name: P:DDG.IDTS.DtsType
member.summary: Gets the dts service type: scs or ctv.

member.name: M:DDG.IDTS.IsEnabled
member.summary: Returns true if this DTS is enabled.

member.name: M:DDG.IDTS.Start(System.String)
member.summary: Starts DTS capturing. SCS only.

member.name: M:DDG.IDTS.Stop(System.String)
member.summary: Starts DTS capturing. SCS only.

member.name: M:DDG.IDTS.Reset
member.summary: Clears any internal state.

member.name: M:DDG.IDTS.GetPinNames
member.summary: Returns the list of pin names from which the CTVs are going to be captured.
member.returns: pin names as list of string.

member.name: M:DDG.IDTS.GetValues(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.String,System.Boolean,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double}}@)
member.summary: Decodes CTV data into DTS readings.

member.name: M:DDG.IDTS.EvaluateLimits(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double}})
member.summary: Evaluates DTS limits for captured data.

member.name: M:DDG.IDTS.PrintToDatalog(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double}},System.String)
member.summary: Prints data to console according to user settings.

member.name: M:DDG.IDTS.GetVoltageTargetsMapping
member.summary: Gets the mapping of voltage targets to sensors.
member.returns: Dictionary where keys are the voltage targets and the values are the associated to the sensors.

member.name: T:DDG.IDTSFactory
member.summary: Defines the .

member.summary: Factory method.

member.summary: Clears PCS_DTSMAX stats.

member.name: M:DDG.IDTSFactory.EndOfDevice(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Logs PCS_DTSMAX stats.

member.summary: Gets CTV capture pin.

member.summary: Resets captured values.

member.summary: Starts DTS capturing.

member.summary: Starts DTS capturing.
